news.title: Trump’s Brokerage Accounts Made Big Trades Around ‘Liberation Day’ Tariffs
news.summary: President Trump’s “Liberation Day” tariffs in April 2025 pushed financial markets into a tailspin, sending Wall Street and everyday investors scrambling to shield themselves from the fallout.  In a series of trades on April 3 and April 4—the days after Trump announced global tariffs in the Rose Garden—his investment accounts bought and sold hundreds of individual stocks, according to financial disclosures released this week.  Trump posted on social media the next morning that it was “a great time to buy” and paused much of his tariff regimen that afternoon.
